case_title: FITZPATRICK, TIMOTHY S. vs. DANERMAN, BORIS IND AND AS PARTNERS et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FITZPATRICK, TIMOTHY S.
